# Motivational Speaker / Training Firm Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-motivational-speaker-motivational-speaker-site
**Vertical slug:** motivational-speaker
**VN-ID:** VN-CRE-004
**Niche family:** NF-CRE-SPK (standalone)
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's motivational speaking and corporate training sector is active — figures like Sam Adeyemi, Fela Durotoye, and Lanre Olusola command corporate and institutional bookings. CIPM (Chartered Institute of Personnel Management) membership and NITAD certification add credibility. Revenue comes from keynote fees (₦200,000–₦5M), corporate training retainers, book sales, and online courses. WhatsApp is the primary booking channel. Church and corporate conference markets are the largest segments.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **HR Manager Kemi, 38, Lagos FMCG**: Needs a speaker for annual employee conference. Checks speaking reel, topics, CIPM credentials, and booking fee. Contacts via WhatsApp or email.
- **Pastor Obinna, 45, megachurch**: Wants a motivational speaker for youth retreat. Checks Christian values alignment, speaking style, and availability. WhatsApp DM.
- **University Dean, Ibadan**: Sourcing speaker for convocation. Needs academic/professional credibility, speaking samples, fee schedule.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (speaker photo, tagline, specialisation), speaking reel video link, WhatsApp booking CTA, featured topics, trust strip (CIPM, NITAD, client logos)
- **About**: Bio, credentials, CIPM membership, published books, life story summary
- **Services**: Speaking topics (keynote, workshop, training), packages with ₦ booking fees, online course links
- **Contact**: WhatsApp booking brief, enquiry form (NDPR-compliant), speaking calendar

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Inspirational, credibility-first, results-forward. "CIPM-Certified", "Nigeria's Leading Leadership Coach", "Transform Your Team" language. Reference CIPM, NITAD, NIM (Nigerian Institute of Management). Primary CTA: "Book [Name] to Speak". Secondary: "Request a Quote via WhatsApp".

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- CIPM membership displayed
- NITAD certification
- NIM (Nigerian Institute of Management) affiliation
- Published book covers
- Client logos (Nigerian corporates, churches, universities)
- Speaking reel video
- Media appearances (TV, radio)

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Speaker commanding large Nigerian corporate conference — suits, branded backdrop
2. Training session — interactive workshop, participants engaged, Lagos hotel
3. Church speaking engagement — faith-based conference, large congregation
4. One-on-one executive coaching — professional office, Lagos
5. Book signing — Nigerian corporate event, published title visible
6. Media appearance — speaker on Channels TV, TVC, or NTA set
7. Speaker headshot — professional, confident, Nigerian studio setting

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] CIPM membership or NITAD cert displayed where applicable
- [ ] CAC registration for training firm
- [ ] NDPR consent on booking form
- [ ] Financial terms and refund policy for paid events

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp booking CTA on home and contact pages
- [x] CIPM/NITAD trust signals
- [x] ₦ booking fees stated
- [x] Nigerian conference/church market references
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on contact form
